headline: Tesla Q1 deliveries rise 9% amid Robotaxi focus

headline: Stock Market Today, March 31: Tesla Rises Ahead of Delivery Report as Rally Eases Demand Concerns
summary: Tesla rose as the market rallied, with focus turning to its delivery report and whether weaker vehicle demand will test the stock’s recent rebound.

raw.headline: Stock Market Today, March 31: Tesla Rises Ahead of Delivery Report as Rally Eases Demand Concerns

headline: Drivers in Dire Crashes Relied Too Much on Ford’s Hands-Free Technology, NTSB Says
summary: Overreliance on  Ford  hands-free driving system and limitations of the technology were partly to blame in two fatal 2024 crashes that left three people dead, federal investigators said.  The National Transportation Safety Board Tuesday voted 4-0 to accept a report from investigators in the crashes in Texas and Pennsylvania.  The report found that drivers failed to keep their attention to the road while using Ford’s advanced driving technology, known as Blue Cruise.

The report found that drivers failed to keep their attention to the road while using Ford’s advanced driving technology, known as Blue Cruise.

headline: Wednesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
summary: The three major averages soared Tuesday on traders' hope that an end could be in sight for the war in Iran. The Dow Industrials jumped more than 1,100 points.

headline: The Home Depot Names Franziska Bell EVP and Chief Technology Officer
summary: The Home Depot®, the world's largest home improvement retailer, today announced that Dr. Franziska "Fran" Bell has been named executive vice president (EVP) and chief technology officer (CTO), effective April 6. As CTO, she will lead the strategy, development and alignment of technology, product management, data and artificial intelligence (AI) for The Home Depot.

headline: Ford and onX Give Owners a Complimentary Year of Off-Road Navigation
summary: From Explorer Tremor to F-150 Raptor R, Ford Motor Company offers vehicles ready for adventure. Now, through a new collaboration with onX, a pioneer in outdoor digital off-road navigation, Ford owners will have the tools to help fully explore what their vehicles–and the outdoors–make possible. 1

headline: Ford cancels summer shutdown at 4 plants to boost F-Series production
summary: Due to a fire at a supplier, Ford has struggled to produce enough F-Series trucks to meet demand. It is taking steps to fix that problem.
